input:
Title: Security: rotate API key hashes from SHA-1 to SHA-256
Author: Ivan Petrov
Assignee: Ivan Petrov
Reviewer: Security Team
Labels: security, breaking-change
Milestone: v0.9.0

Body:
We're currently using SHA-1 for API key hashing. This must be migrated to SHA-256 before GA.

Migration plan:
1. Add sha256_hash column to api_keys
2. Dual-write during transition period (30 days)
3. Remove sha1_hash column

Breaking: clients must re-generate keys. Coordinating with Andrea Fano from Customer Success.
